title: Mining Remediation Authority pay gap report 2025
body: "Our report provides data on the pay gap at the Mining Remediation Authority and contains:   an explanation of pay gap terminology details of our current pay gap and explanations on how it is changing historical pay gap data a summary of initiatives to improve equality, diversity and inclusion in the future    Customer services, mining reports and records   Mining Remediation Authority200 Lichfield LaneMansfieldNottinghamshireNG18 4RG     Email customerservice@miningremediation.gov.uk     Telephone 0345 762 6848      "
